description: human settlement in Hamilton County, Tennessee, United States of America
description_wiki: Soddy-Daisy is a city in Hamilton County, Tennessee, United States.

aliases: Ground forces of the United States Armed Forces
description: land service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Army (U.S. Army) is the land service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

description: state-supported community college in Morristown, Tennessee
description_wiki: Walters State Community College (WSCC or Walters State) is a public community college based in Morristown, Tennessee.

description: armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia between North Vietnam and South Vietnam, from 1955 to 1975
description_wiki: The Vietnam War (1 November 1955 – 30 April 1975) was an armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia fought between North Vietnam (Democratic Republic of Vietnam) and South Vietnam (Republic of Vietnam) and their allies.

description: United States Army installation in Kentucky
description_wiki: Fort Campbell is a United States Army installation located between the Kentucky–Tennessee border between Hopkinsville, Kentucky and Clarksville, Tennessee.

description: United States Army installation in Vernon Parish, Louisiana, United States, formerly named Fort Johnson
description_wiki: Fort Polk, formerly Fort Johnson, is a United States Army installation located in Vernon Parish, Louisiana, about 10 miles (15 km) east of Leesville and 30 miles (50 km) north of DeRidder in Beauregard Parish.

description: US military joint service installation near Tacoma, Washington, United States
description_wiki: Joint Base Lewis–McChord (JBLM) is a U.S. installation located 9.1 miles (14.6 km) south-southwest of Tacoma, Washington, operated by the United States Army.

description: defunct airline in the United States (1930–2001)
description_wiki: Trans World Airlines (TWA) was a trunk carrier, a scheduled airline in the United States that operated from 1930 until it was acquired by American Airlines in 2001.
Japan is an island country in East Asia.

description: deep-water bay in Khánh Hòa Province, Vietnam
description_wiki: Cam Ranh Bay (Vietnamese: Vịnh Cam Ranh) is a deep-water bay in Vietnam in Khánh Hòa Province.
The 25th Infantry Division (nicknamed "Tropic Lightning") is a United States Army division based at Schofield Barracks in Hawaii.

description: active United States Army formation, oldest continuously serving division in the Regular Army
description_wiki: The 1st Infantry Division (1ID) is a combined arms division of the United States Army, and is the oldest continuously serving division in the Regular Army.

description: rural district of Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
description_wiki: Củ Chi is a rural district of Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam.
